  "reasoning_paragraph": "Shailesh Bhatt's proposed addition of Ambit Build India Portfolio carries elevated behavioural risk on multiple dimensions. The most consequential signal is structural repetition: all four existing PMS positions were acquired through relationship and RM channels without comparative benchmarking, and the proposed fifth follows an identical peer-network pathway — a fellow Ahmedabad textile exporter three years into the strategy reporting positive results. This is a recency-and-social-proof acquisition mechanism, not an analytical one, and the investor's own acknowledgement of Aanchal's contrary view without modifying his intent confirms that the peer-influence vector is currently dominant over the analytical one. The family decision dynamic is materially relevant: Aanchal returned in December 2025 and produced a structured critique of precisely the wrapper accumulation this action deepens; she is an observer-with-influence whose analytical credibility is high, and the friction between her position and Shailesh's current intent is unresolved rather than settled. The equity band is already at 72.2% against a 70% mandate ceiling; adding Rs 2 Cr to an equity PMS widens the breach without any offsetting exit, and the stated rationale contains no acknowledgement of this. The stated-vs-revealed divergence — aggressive verbally, moderate-aggressive by revealed pattern — is a persistent feature of this investor's profile and is not corrected by this action. Confidence is set at 0.72 rather than higher because zero prior advisor interactions on record means the revealed-pattern read rests entirely on the character bible's qualitative synthesis rather than on a documented decision-event history with this advisory relationship; the directional signal is clear but the calibration precision is limited.",
